descriptionText: YOT 41 For Sale 2025 | Guest Cabins:2 | Crew Cabins:1If you are currently exploring the market for a well‑kept and thoughtfully equipped power catamaran, this YOT 41 For Sale 2025 presents a strong option. Built in 2025 by YOT, the new power range developed by the Catana Group, she reflects the brand’s long-established approach to practical design and efficient performance. Known for more than four decades of experience in performance multihulls, Catana has translated its knowledge into the YOT line with a focus on comfort, stability, and ease of handling.Specifications: • Brand: YOT • Year: 2025 • Length: 12.5 m • Max. Beam: 4.5 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 1 m • Max. Speed: 28 knots • Fuel Tank: 1,700 l • Water Tank: 400 l • Guest Cabins: 2 • Crew: 1 • Engines: 2 x Mercury V8 300 (listing description notes Mercury V12 600 hp)This particular YOT 41 For Sale 2025 is in good condition and has been maintained with care. Her design is centred around a stable platform, helped by the air cushion effect created between the twin hulls, which contributes to a smooth ride even at higher speeds. The yacht is fitted with twin Mercury V12 600 hp engines, providing a combined 1,200 hp of reliable power. The skyhook system and zip wake technology offer added assistance, especially when manoeuvring or maintaining position, which many owners appreciate in daily use.One of the practical upgrades on board is the air conditioning system, which adds comfort whether cruising or at anchor. The electric sun awning and bow shades offer protection and flexible use of outdoor spaces. The cockpit area is designed with versatility in mind: fold‑out panels create additional space, and the seating can be adjusted to form dining areas or sun pads as needed. Corian countertops and a cockpit grill make onboard meals straightforward, and the helm station enclosure allows the captain to remain sheltered while underway. A premium sound system has also been fitted for those who enjoy music during their time on the water.Accommodation includes two separate cabins, each with its own ensuite. This layout works well for small families, couples cruising together, or owners who want personal space for guests. The interior aims for practicality and comfort without unnecessary complication, which suits those who prefer clean, functional living areas.With a maximum speed of 28 knots and a fuel capacity of 1,700 litres, the YOT 41 For Sale 2025 is well suited to day cruising and short island‑hopping. The 400‑litre water tank supports overnight stays without requiring constant refilling. Altogether, this YOT 41 For Sale 2025 offers a stable platform, a useful range of upgrades, and a layout that supports both leisure and short‑term cruising. Her overall condition and equipment make her a worthwhile opportunity for someone seeking a modern 12‑metre power catamaran ready for immediate enjoyment.
descriptionHtml:
YOT 41 For Sale 2025 | Guest Cabins:2 | Crew Cabins:1

If you are currently exploring the market for a well‑kept and thoughtfully equipped power catamaran, this YOT 41 For Sale 2025 presents a strong option. Built in 2025 by YOT, the new power range developed by the Catana Group, she reflects the brand’s long-established approach to practical design and efficient performance. Known for more than four decades of experience in performance multihulls, Catana has translated its knowledge into the YOT line with a focus on comfort, stability, and ease of handling.

Specifications:
• Brand: YOT
• Year: 2025
• Length: 12.5 m
• Max. Beam: 4.5 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 1 m
• Max. Speed: 28 knots
• Fuel Tank: 1,700 l
• Water Tank: 400 l
• Guest Cabins: 2
• Crew: 1
• Engines: 2 x Mercury V8 300 (listing description notes Mercury V12 600 hp)

This particular YOT 41 For Sale 2025 is in good condition and has been maintained with care. Her design is centred around a stable platform, helped by the air cushion effect created between the twin hulls, which contributes to a smooth ride even at higher speeds. The yacht is fitted with twin Mercury V12 600 hp engines, providing a combined 1,200 hp of reliable power. The skyhook system and zip wake technology offer added assistance, especially when manoeuvring or maintaining position, which many owners appreciate in daily use.

One of the practical upgrades on board is the air conditioning system, which adds comfort whether cruising or at anchor. The electric sun awning and bow shades offer protection and flexible use of outdoor spaces. The cockpit area is designed with versatility in mind: fold‑out panels create additional space, and the seating can be adjusted to form dining areas or sun pads as needed. Corian countertops and a cockpit grill make onboard meals straightforward, and the helm station enclosure allows the captain to remain sheltered while underway. A premium sound system has also been fitted for those who enjoy music during their time on the water.

Accommodation includes two separate cabins, each with its own ensuite. This layout works well for small families, couples cruising together, or owners who want personal space for guests. The interior aims for practicality and comfort without unnecessary complication, which suits those who prefer clean, functional living areas.

With a maximum speed of 28 knots and a fuel capacity of 1,700 litres, the YOT 41 For Sale 2025 is well suited to day cruising and short island‑hopping. The 400‑litre water tank supports overnight stays without requiring constant refilling. Altogether, this YOT 41 For Sale 2025 offers a stable platform, a useful range of upgrades, and a layout that supports both leisure and short‑term cruising. Her overall condition and equipment make her a worthwhile opportunity for someone seeking a modern 12‑metre power catamaran ready for immediate enjoyment.
